response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with ~16 years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP). However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor Principal Engineer in AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI thought leadership. The resume shows only brief, recent AI-adjacent work and no evidence of AI research, published AI products, strategic advisory experience, or the scale of technical leadership expected at this level.
strengths: ~16 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for an AI-strategy Principal role
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Director-level / Principal with strategic advisory or executive influence experience
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth (some AWS CDK at Optilyz); no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product futures

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship
